--- 
title: "The Sacraments"
author: "James Bannerman"
date: "1868"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output: 
  bookdown::gitbook:
    config:
      toc:
        scroll_highlight: yes
      fontsettings:
        theme: white
        family: serif
        size: 2
      includes:
        after_body: reftagger.html
always_allow_html: yes
documentclass: book
bibliography: [book.bib, packages.bib]
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes
github-repo: warhornmedia/bannerman-sacraments
description: "At the end of section 3 of James Bannerman's *Church of Christ* is this masterful section on the sacraments."
cover-image: "images/cover.png"
---

# [A Warhorn Historicals Book](https://historicals.warhornmedia.com/) {-}

<center>

![](images/warhornlogo.png){ width=50% }

Republished by Warhorn Historicals: 
Making historical books available for free online in high quality, readable formats. 

</center>

We hope this book is a blessing to you. If it is, please [make a one-time or recurring contribution](https://warhornmedia.com/give) right now, sponsor a book from our upcoming list, or volunteer your proofreading or technical skills to help produce more content. Contact [Lucas Weeks](mailto:lucas@beggarsborn.com) to get involved.

God bless,

—The Warhorn Team

Original scanned images of this book are available in two places for proofreading or checking for errors: [Archive.org](https://archive.org/details/churchofchristtr02bann/page/n11/mode/2up) and [Google Books](https://www.google.com/books/edition/_/Z_BBAAAAYAAJ?hl=en&gbpv=0).

#### Cover {-}
```{r fig.align='center', echo=FALSE, include=identical(knitr:::pandoc_to(), 'html'), fig.link='https://www.warhornmedia.com'}
knitr::include_graphics('images/cover.png', dpi = NA)
```

# Introduction {-}

Nobody understands the Church like Bannerman, and this section on the Sacraments is mandatory reading today.
